- observable feature: object is an airplane
- observable feature: object has wings and tail fins
- observable feature: object is on ground or near ground
</features>
<kb>
- IF [object is an airplane AND object has wings and tail fins AND object is on ground or near ground] THEN [0]
- IF [object has greenish-brown skin and rounded body] THEN [6]
- IF [object has horse-like body shape and legs] THEN [7]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the Query Image shows an airplane with wings and tail fins, positioned on the ground or near ground, matching the features defined for class 0.
</rule_check>

<response>0</response>
